title: Nodia Guns System (Old)
body:
Literally just a 42 hour project about minecraft having boom boom guns

For now I just added 3 types of guns:

- SINGLE: Pistol like 1 bullet per click
- BURST: 5 bullet per click
- GRENADE: TF2 Demoman.

First time you get 1 ammo config file and 3 gun config files, 1 grenade config file to get you started.

I'll probably update this in a day or two with more gun types

UPDATE 1.1: YAY I DID WORK ON THIS!

Added 1:
- CustomModelData support in gun configs. You can look at burst.yml template to see how it was used.
- Aim Down Sights: !!! YAY !!! You can now shift to turn on ADS, And no. Not advirtpoos.. i forgor how to spell. You'll also need a seperate model for this. Same thing as CustomModelData, Just move your gun model to look like you are holding it infront of you.
- GRENADES??: Yeah. Grenades. You'll also need your own models to use it, Again. CustomModelData setup is needed in a resource pack.

Current To Do's:
- More gun types
- Recoil

Current Commands:

/nginfo
/nodiagn givegun id / giveammo id
